mapper.select: SELECT id, project_id, mcp_server_id, tool_name, description, input_schema_json, snapshot_version, status, scanned_at FROM project_mcp_tool_snapshot WHERE mcp_server_id = #{mcpServerId} ORDER BY tool_name ASC

SELECT id, project_id, mcp_server_id, tool_name, description, input_schema_json, snapshot_version, status, scanned_at FROM project_mcp_tool_snapshot WHERE project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY tool_name ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO project_mcp_tool_snapshot (id, project_id, mcp_server_id, tool_name, description, input_schema_json, snapshot_version, status, scanned_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{projectId}, #{mcpServerId}, #{toolName}, #{description}, #{inputSchemaJson}, #{snapshotVersion}, #{status}, #{scannedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM project_mcp_tool_snapshot WHERE mcp_server_id = #{mcpServerId}
